name: Default Video (React)
jsx:
import { selectError } from '@videojs/core/dom'; import { forwardRef, useRef } from 'react'; import { AlertDialog, Container, usePlayer, BufferingIndicator, CaptionsButton, Controls, FullscreenButton, MuteButton, PiPButton, PlayButton, PlaybackRateButton, Popover, SeekButton, Time, TimeSlider, Tooltip, VolumeSlider } from '@videojs/react'; export function ErrorDialog({ classes }) { const errorState = usePlayer(selectError); const lastError = useRef(errorState?.error); if (errorState?.error) lastError.current = errorState.error; if (!errorState) return null; return ( { if (!open) errorState.dismissError(); }}>
Something went wrong. {lastError.current?.message ?? 'An error occurred while trying to play the video. Please try again.'}
OK
); } const SEEK_TIME = 10; const Button = forwardRef(function Button({ className, ...props }, ref) { return )}/>}/> ()}/>}/> Seek backward {SEEK_TIME} seconds ()}/>}/> Seek forward {SEEK_TIME} seconds )}/>}/> ()}/>}/> ()}/>}/> ()}/>}/> {/*
An example cue

); }
